arts.ttl: West Ham fans miss multiple goals after leaving the London Stadium en masse after going 4-0 down against Arsenal inside 36 minutes
arts.sum: Saturday night's Premier League game between West Ham United and Arsenal delivered seven goals in the first half. But thousands of Hammers fans missed three of them.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Premier League release statement on Bukayo Saka incident during West Ham vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka won a first-half penalty for Arsenal against West Ham, though the incident had to be checked by the VAR before Martin Odegaard scored from the spot-kick

arts.ttl: Arsenal working on new contracts for English duo as 'proactive' approach revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal are 'proactively' working to tie Bukayo Saka and Ethan Nwaneri down to new contracts in North London, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Odegaard-Saka combo sets up Trossard to double Arsenal's lead!
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard doubles Arsenal's lead against West Ham at the London Stadium!

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak Arsenal transfer twist as Arteta sent huge reminder amid Viktor Gyokeres decision
arts.sum: Considering how he has thrived in the Premier League over the last two years, Isak could be Arteta's first-choice if he opts to bring in a new forward, however he has just ben sent a clear transfer warning. Arsenal and Mikel Arteta may have been sent a clear Alexander Isak warning amid transfer interest in the Newcastle star.

arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer double injury blow before Man United clash as Mikel Arteta delivers update
arts.sum: Arsenal midfield duo Thomas Partey and Mikel Merino miss out on selection for the Gunners' Premier League clash with West Ham United due to injury.

arts.ttl: 'WHO ELSE?!' | Gabriel heads Arsenal into early lead!
arts.sum: Gabriel heads Arsenal into an early lead against West Ham at the London Stadium!
Fifth-place Arsenal travel to the London Stadium to face West Ham who lie 14th in the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News: RB Leipzig push Benjamin Sesko to the Gunners - but there's a problem
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko signed a new RB Leipzig contract in the summer to continue his development in a familiar environment. After his extension, Sesko explained that he decided to stay and continue his development in the Bundesliga for at least another season, but this decision is looking increasingly questionable.

arts.ttl: 'Funny' - Neville responds to what he heard Carragher say about West Ham this week
arts.sum: Gary Neville has laughed about comments that Jamie Carragher made before West Ham beat Newcastle on Monday. The Hammers beat the Magpies 2-0 on 25... The post 'Funny' - Neville responds to what he heard Carragher say about West Ham this week appeared first on West Ham Zone.
